decisions.decision: Replaced uuid.v4() with expo-crypto randomUUID() globally
decisions.rationale: React Native lacks crypto.getRandomValues; expo-crypto is already a dependency
Android modal stacking renders sibling Modals behind each other

decisions.decision: DungeonSheet must call loadActiveSession on open
decisions.rationale: Store activeSession was never hydrated from DB -- caused stale idle view and Available Tomorrow bug
Countdown badge toggling caused layout shift
